meta.title: The BIG problem the Air Force's NGAD fighter has to overcome
meta.description:
Go to https://ground.news/Sandboxx to stay fully informed on military developments around the world. Subscribe through my link right now for 40% off their Vantage Plan, which is what I use everyday.

– BREAK –

A new Air Force report predicting changes to the threat environment out through 2050 now places the future of NGAD into question, as the aircraft's required capabilities truly begins to blur the line between fighters and bombers. 

Big thanks to Rodrigo Avella for the use of his aircraft renders! Make sure to go to https://rodrigoavella.com for more of his incredible artwork!
